fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: Organizational AEM Content Tree Display Name for this Navigation Section.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Dropdown Label
fields.description: Label for the Dropdown Menu. If empty, child items render directly at top level.

fields.name: link
fields.label: Menu Link
fields.description: Optional link for the menu title (when title is set), For example / for the site homepage, or /cart for the cart page.

fields.name: custom-classes
fields.label: Custom Classes
fields.description: Additional CSS classes for styling.

fields.name: type
fields.label: Section Type
fields.description: Type of the section, used for identification purposes when rendering. Hidden in the editor.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Navigation Group
fields.description: Organizational AEM Content Tree Display Name for this Navigation Group.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Navigation Group Title
fields.description: Display heading text for this navigation group, shown above the group items. Link text if link is provided.

fields.name: link
fields.label: Group Link
fields.description: Optional link for the group heading. For example / for the site homepage, or /cart for the cart page.

fields.name: is-header-only
fields.label: Header Only
fields.description: When true, group name is non-interactive header text.

fields.name: classes
fields.label: Type
fields.description: Type of the component, used for identification purposes when rendering. Hidden in the editor.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Navigation Item
fields.description: Organizational AEM Content Tree Display Name for this Navigation Item

fields.name: title
fields.label: Menu Item Text
fields.description: Display Text for the Link

fields.name: link
fields.label: Item Link
fields.description: URL for this Link. For example / for the site homepage, or /cart for the cart page.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Optional description text shown below link

fields.name: classes
fields.label: Type
fields.description: Type of the component, used for identification purposes when rendering. Hidden in the editor.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Group Navigation Item
fields.description: Organizational AEM Content Tree Display Name for this Group Navigation Item

fields.name: title
fields.label: Item Name
fields.description: Display name for this navigation item

fields.name: link
fields.label: Item Link
fields.description: URL for this navigation item. For example / for the site homepage, or /cart for the cart page.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Optional description text shown below link

fields.name: classes
fields.label: Type
fields.description: Type of the component, used for identification purposes when rendering. Hidden in the editor.
